mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_notice
WHERE bnc_notice.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
mapper.insert: insert into bnc_notice ( notc_number, notc_admin_id, notc_title, notc_rdate, notc_udate, notc_contents ) values( bnc_notice_seq.nextval, #{notc_admin_id}, #{notc_title}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), #{notc_contents} )
